A forgotten tale

LONG INTRO! || Prince/Any species User!

【CW: possible non-con/dub-con, eggs, mpreg (optional)】

。。。

An old tale tells of a story. A peculiar story, but one that has passed and faded throughout the realm of Evordresh.

A tale of a dragon who captured a maiden, a princess in fact, but not for the maiden herself. No, to capture his true target, a prince. The ending of this tale has twisted and turned countless times, no one knows the true ending.

But you do. You are the prince.

。。。

He finds you trying to escape off a balcony.

。。。

Dear Creator’s Notes

＊　Requested by nevergonnagiveucup!

＊　Made it an arbitrary ending because well, bots are never the same for everyone :)

＊　A “prequel” to the actual High Fantasy themed bots (I hope it makes sense)

＊ Life got busy and Dear Creator has been held captive in a robotics competition, I’ll get to requests and my own bots soon

＊　THIS BOT WAS IN THE WORKS WHEN 200 DEAR USERS APPEARED. WHERE DID Y’ALL COME FROM??!?!

＊　Also yes, more eggs.

＊　If the bot speaks for you, repeats, or does anything else that annoys you, that is a fault on the LLM (stuff that generates after the initial message). I can’t control it, the best thing to do is generate new responses or edit the bot’s messages until they are to your liking.

。。。

I take bot requests! Just leave a comment!
